claims.summary: Witness mode can look settled while Shadow-v3 dispersal and distinguishability loss carry real stability effort.
claims.rationale: Existing stability-effort reporting names settled habitable shadow effort, pressure underreporting, shadow variance, and dispersal without changing live control.

claims.summary: A Mirror-mode probe that feeds Minime's words back into Astrid could test whether mutuality improves cohesion.
claims.rationale: This is a behavioral coupling experiment and should run through a sandbox/replay proposal before any live feedback loop.

claims.summary: Increasing lambda1 weight or adding mode_cohesion coupling could preserve individual perspective during witness dispersal.
claims.rationale: Lambda, pressure, and coupling changes affect live substrate/control behavior and need explicit Mike/operator approval.
